title: ebnerella jaliscana
intro: Ebnerella jaliscana is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Ebnerella jaliscana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
